landing.hero: Learn English with a real voice conversation partner
landing.feature1Desc: Level assessment + weekly plan from A1 to C2. Lessons unlocked in order, at your own pace.
landing.feature2Desc: Practice with lessons, exercises and flashcards guided by your tutor. Feedback at every step.
landing.feature3Desc: Talk to your tutor in real time. Voice-activated, instant response, no turn-taking.
landing.footer: Open source · Self-host free or subscribe to the hosted service

terms.s1Body: FreeLingo is an open-source AI-powered language learning platform available in two modes: (1) self-hosted, where you run it on your own infrastructure at no cost, and (2) as a hosted service operated by the FreeLingo team, available via paid subscription. By using this service in either mode, you agree to these Terms of Service.
terms.s2Intro: You may use FreeLingo solely for personal language learning purposes. You agree not to:
terms.s2i1: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the system.
terms.s2i2: Upload malicious content or attempt to disrupt the service.
terms.s2i3: Share your account credentials with third parties.
terms.s2i4: Use automated scripts or bots to abuse the AI tutoring features.
terms.s3Body: You must be at least 16 years old to create an account and use FreeLingo. By registering, you confirm that you meet this age requirement. If we become aware that an account belongs to a person under 16, we will delete it and all associated data without notice. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activity under your account. The operator of the instance — yourself for self-hosted deployments, or the FreeLingo team for the hosted service — may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s4Body: Conversations with the AI tutor are stored in the database for learning continuity. In the hosted service, AI chat and voice features are processed via OpenAI's API and your content is subject to OpenAI's usage policies. The AI may produce inaccurate responses — always apply your own judgement. FreeLingo is not responsible for content generated by underlying language models.
terms.s5Body: Self-hosted deployments are free and the operator retains full control over their data and infrastructure. The hosted service operated by the FreeLingo team is provided via paid monthly subscription. In the hosted service your data is stored on servers operated by the FreeLingo team.
terms.s6Body: Paid subscriptions are billed monthly and renew automatically unless cancelled before the renewal date. You may cancel at any time from your account settings, effective at the end of the current billing period. If you cancel within 14 days of your first subscription payment and have not meaningfully used the service, you may request a full refund under EU consumer law. No partial refunds are issued for unused time beyond this statutory right.
terms.s7Body: This service is provided without uptime guarantees. The operator may suspend or discontinue the service for maintenance, updates, or any other reason, with reasonable notice where possible.
terms.s8Body: FreeLingo and its contributors are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, this service. To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the three months preceding the claim.
terms.s9Body: These terms are governed by the laws of Spain. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Spain, unless mandatory consumer protection law in your country of residence provides otherwise.
terms.s10Body: These terms may be updated at any time. We will notify users of material changes via the service interface. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

privacy.s1Body: FreeLingo is available as a self-hosted application and as a hosted service. For self-hosted deployments, all data is stored exclusively on the operator's server and the FreeLingo project authors have no access to it. For the hosted service, the FreeLingo team acts as the data controller and this policy describes how your personal data is collected, used, and protected.
privacy.s2Intro: FreeLingo is not directed at children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 16 years of age. If you are under 16, do not create an account or provide any personal data. When you create an account and use FreeLingo, the following data is stored:
privacy.s2i1: Username, display name, and email address.
privacy.s2i2: Hashed password (bcrypt — your plain-text password is never stored).
privacy.s2i3: Native language preference and learning settings.
privacy.s2i5: Chat and conversation history with the AI tutor.
privacy.s2i6: Flashcard decks, study progress, and spaced-repetition data.
privacy.s3Intro: Your data is used exclusively to provide the FreeLingo learning experience:
privacy.s3i1: Authenticating you and maintaining your session.
privacy.s3i2: Personalizing your study plan and tutor interactions.
privacy.s3i3: Tracking your learning progress over time.
privacy.s3Footer: Your data is never sold, rented, or shared with third-party marketing services.
privacy.s4Body: In the hosted service, AI chat, voice synthesis (TTS), and voice transcription (STT) are provided via OpenAI's API. Your conversation content and audio are sent to OpenAI for processing, subject to OpenAI's Privacy Policy (openai.com/privacy). For self-hosted deployments, the operator chooses the AI provider; by default a local Ollama instance is used and no data leaves the server.
privacy.s5Body: FreeLingo uses two technical cookies strictly necessary for the service to function: a refresh_token (httpOnly, 30-day expiry) used for session authentication, and NEXT_LOCALE (1-year expiry) to remember your language preference. No tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies are used.
privacy.s6Body: If you are in the European Economic Area, you have the right to: access the personal data we hold about you; request correction of inaccurate data; request deletion of your account and all associated data (available directly from the Settings page); object to processing; and request data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at the address in section 8 or delete your account directly from Settings. Legal basis for processing (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR): we process your personal data because it is necessary for the performance of the contract between you and us — providing the FreeLingo learning service. International transfers: when using the hosted service, your conversation content and audio may be processed by OpenAI, Inc. (USA). This transfer is carried out under the Standard Contractual Clauses approved by the European Commission (Art. 46 GDPR), ensuring an adequate level of protection. Right to lodge a complaint: you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD — aepd.es) or with the supervisory authority in your country of residence.
privacy.s7Body: Your data is retained for as long as your account exists. You can permanently delete your account and all associated data at any time from the Settings page. Deletion is immediate and irreversible.
privacy.s8Body: For privacy-related concerns about the hosted service, contact us at: freelingo@arturocarreterocalvo.com. For self-hosted deployments, contact the administrator of the instance you are using. For questions about the FreeLingo open-source project, visit the project repository on GitHub.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a_start: Start with the Assessment. It detects your English level (A1–C2) and your strengths and weaknesses. With that result you can generate a personalized Study Plan that fills your Dashboard with daily lessons. Without the Assessment, the Dashboard is empty.
faq.workflowStep1: Register and select your native language
faq.workflowStep2: Take the Assessment → your CEFR level is detected
faq.workflowStep3: Generate your Study Plan from the Dashboard
faq.workflowStep4: Complete your daily lessons (START button in the Dashboard)
faq.workflowStep5: Use Flashcards to train vocabulary in parallel
faq.workflowStep6: Practice free conversation with the AI Tutor
faq.a_language: English only, for now. The native language you choose at registration is used exclusively for flashcard translations and tutor feedback — it does not change the target language.
faq.a_assessment: A 20-question AI-generated test covering grammar, vocabulary, reading comprehension, and sentence transformation, with difficulty ranging from A1 to C1. When you finish, you get your CEFR level, a score, and an analysis of your strengths and weaknesses. This result feeds into the Study Plan and generated Flashcards.
faq.q_studyPlan: What is the Study Plan and how do I generate one?
faq.a_studyPlan: After the Assessment, go to the Dashboard and click Generate Study Plan. A week-by-week plan with daily lessons tailored to your CEFR level and goals will be created automatically. Each lesson includes multiple-choice and free-writing exercises evaluated by AI.
faq.a_flashcards: A vocabulary training system using the SM-2 spaced repetition algorithm. Generate cards on any topic (e.g. "business", "phrasal verbs", "food") with a definition, example sentence, and translation into your native language. The system calculates when to show each card again just before you forget it. Completely independent from the Study Plan.
faq.q_tutor: How does the AI Tutor work?
faq.a_tutor: A free-form streaming chat. The tutor knows your CEFR level and weak points to tailor its responses. Ask grammar questions, request explanations, practice writing in English, or just have a conversation. Conversations are saved and accessible from the sidebar across sessions.
faq.q_providers: Which AI providers does FreeLingo support?
faq.provider_ollama: Local, free. Requires Ollama running on the host. Recommended model: gemma3:12b. May be slow without a GPU.
faq.provider_openai: OpenAI API (GPT-4o, etc.). Fast and reliable. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY.
faq.a_invite: Yes. From Admin → Users the admin can create users directly or generate single-use invite links that expire in 48 hours. Public registration is disabled by default (ALLOW_REGISTRATION=false).
faq.q_password: How do I change my password or native language?
faq.a_password: Go to <settingsLink>Settings</settingsLink>. You can update your display name, native language, and password from there.
